packs.name: 1st Birthday Skin Pack
packs.description: Join the Minecraft party now!

packs.name: 2nd Birthday Skin Pack
packs.description: Minecraft is growing up, time to celebrate together our 2nd Birthday!

packs.name: 3rd Birthday Skin Pack
packs.description: Celebrate Minecraft's 3rd Birthday on Xbox with the original Minecraft developers! Find their personal skins in this free celebration pack.

packs.name: 4th Birthday Skin Pack
packs.description: Dress up for the party with this new, free skin pack and celebrate together the 4th Minecraft birthday!

packs.name: 5th Birthday Skin Pack
packs.description: Join the celebrations for the 5th birthday of Minecraft with this new, free skin pack featuring the one and only 4J Studios development team! Party on!

packs.name: Adventure Time
packs.description: Adventure Time, c'mon grab your tools, we're going to a very blocky world. With Jake the Dog and Finn the Human, and a bundle of their friends, it's Adventure Time!… Mash-up! Featured in this pack: your favorite Adventure Time characters, the Land of Ooo, a bespoke texture set, BMO themed UI and original soundtrack.

packs.name: Battle & Beasts 2
packs.description: This second Battle & Beasts pack brings you more Animals, more Warriors and some surprising Mammals too! I am the Walrus!!

packs.name: Battle & Beasts
packs.description: By popular demand, Warriors and Animals are the main flavours for this Skin Pack. Hope you enjoy customizing your Minecraft character with these!

packs.name: Biome Settlers Pack 1
packs.description: Check out these new looks, influenced by the Forest, Tundra, and Desert biomes. All of these skins have been inspired by the world of Minecraft and the different ways you play!

packs.name: Biome Settlers Pack 2
packs.description: Dress as a denizen of the Nether or a Mushroom Island!

packs.name: Strangers - Biome Settlers 3
packs.description: Get this pack and make your home in distant lands or ocean depths!

packs.name: Campfire Tales
packs.description: Gather round the fire and listen to the tales of these 16 spooky skins! From mythical monsters to horrible hauntings and other strange sightings, this supernatural skin pack is the ideal way to frighten friends this Halloween.

packs.name: Chinese Mythology
packs.description: Journey through epic terrain and find enlightenment in the land of dragons with this Mash-up Pack inspired by the myths and legends of China. Minecrafters get to explore a Chinese Mythology-themed world, with glorious Textures, legendary Skins and enchanting Music. The Pack also includes a themed Battle map exclusive to this Mash-up!

packs.name: The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim
packs.description: The Dragonborn meets Minecraft in a clash of epic proportions. Build your own worlds in the land of Tamriel and experience adventure with many of its most iconic characters. Fus Ro Dah!

packs.name: Egyptian Mythology
packs.description: Will you survive the perils of the Pyramids? Journey through the Valley of the Kings, dodge deadly traps and explore the ancient tombs below! The fourth pack in the Mythology series, this Egyptian-themed Mash-up comes with textures fit for a Pharaoh, legendary mobs, a pantheon of skins and an epic soundtrack!

packs.name: Festive
packs.description: Celebrate the Festive period with this wintery mash-up pack containing a Festive style Texture Pack, Skin Pack, new music and a Festive world!

packs.name: From the Shadows
packs.description: What lurks beyond your vision, in the darkness beneath the bed? The spooky closet is whispering "I think you'll lose your head." Clothe yourself with horror, join the beasts and scare; "From the Shadows" could mean you, but only if you dare! Get these excruciatingly detailed horrors in the "From the Shadows" HD skin pack.

packs.name: Greek Mythology
packs.description: It's mythical Greece at your thumb sticks in this new Minecraft Mash-up pack! Greek gods, fantastical creatures and epic locations are all sculpted into our dedicated game world. We've even made a bespoke texture set and themed UI, and wrapped it all up with an orchestral soundtrack. This is the stuff of legends! Go make your own!

packs.name: Halloween
packs.description: Happy Halloween! Dress suitably spookily and prepare for the ultimate Minecraft Halloween thrill ride!

packs.name: LittleBigPlanet
packs.description:
Mix the crazy, non-stop creativity of LittleBigPlanet™ into the endless fun and freedom of Minecraft with this special mashup pack.


Sackboy®, Sackgirl®, OddSock, Toggle and Swoop will decorate your Minecraft universe with a whole heap of LBP™ characters, creatures and stuff.

packs.name: Magic: The Gathering
packs.description: Deck yourself out as the most powerful Planeswalkers in the Multiverse.

packs.name: Super Mario
packs.description: Super Mario meets Minecraft! This Mash-Up Pack contains a Super Mario style Texture Pack, Skin Pack, and a Super Mario themed world to explore!

packs.name: Marvel Avengers
packs.description: Step into Minecraft dressed as one of Earth's Mightiest Heroes (or powerful villains) with this incredible Skin Pack, featuring core team members from Marvel's Avengers including Iron Man, Captain America, Hulk, Thor, and many more iconic characters from the Marvel Universe.

packs.name: Marvel Guardians of the Galaxy
packs.description: Join Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy in the most cosmic Marvel skin pack for Minecraft yet! Star-Lord, Gamora, Rocket, Groot and Drax are only part of the pack of 24 skins inspired both by Marvel's blockbuster film and the comic books.

packs.name: Marvel Spider-Man
packs.description: Look out! Here comes the Spider-Man Skin Pack! Featuring an assortment of 35 friends and foes straight from the saga of your favorite Wall-Crawler, this pack is sure to amaze. Catch it now!

packs.name: Halo
packs.description: Welcome to the Minecraft Master Chief Mash-up, which includes 50+ Skins, thematic Textures, classic music, and an amazing world filled with iconic moments to explore.

packs.name: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
packs.description: It's Morphin Time! The Mighty Morphin Power Rangers are coming to Minecraft. Including the 5 original Power Rangers and many more characters from the classic series, this skin pack is nothing short of Morphinominal. Go! Go! Power Rangers!

packs.name: Minecon 2015 Skin Pack
packs.description: Alex and Steve are ready for Minecon 2015! They've brought their complete Minecon cape collection with them and don't they both look grand?

packs.name: MINECON 2016 Skin Pack
packs.description: Are you ready for MINECON? This year, our celebratory skin-pack comes with four biome-themed adventurers and a mysterious Enderman cape. Swish!

packs.name: MINECON Earth 2017
packs.description: Join the party, wherever you are - and get dressed for the occasion with these fancy skins, celebrating everything from cosplay to cake! Available for a short time only, so get 'em fast!

packs.name: Mini Game Heroes
packs.description: Become a Mini Game legend with this new sporting skin pack! Swoop round Glide's tightest tracks in lithe llama-suit, cushion Tumble-based fumbles with fluffy cat pads or don your Guardian get-up to bolster both your Battle ranking and your fashion game.

packs.name: Mini Game Masters
packs.description: Calling all beasts of Battle, titans of Tumble and gods of Glide: the ultimate in Mini Game themed sporting skins are here! So slip into that streamlined spandex, strap on those sturdy pads, and prepare to out-style AND out-play your friends.

packs.name: Moana Character Pack
packs.description: Set sail with Moana, Maui & all the crew from Motunui. How far will you go in Minecraft with this adventurous character set? You're welcome!

packs.name: Mass Effect
packs.description: Shape the fate of your Minecraft galaxy with this amazing Mash-up: includes thirty-six character skins, bespoke game textures, themed menus, a dedicated world filled with iconic locations and original soundtrack compilation to set the mood.

packs.name: FINAL FANTASY XV
packs.description: Join Noctis, Gladio, Ignis and Prompto once again as they venture beyond the world of Eos and into the untold realms of Minecraft with this fantastic skin pack. Be it friend or foe, the cast of FINAL FANTASY XV follows, including Cindy, Aranea, Ardyn, the Astrals and many more.

packs.name: Norse Mythology
packs.description: Are you heroic enough to enter the Great Hall, Valhalla? Find out in the Norse Mythology Mash-up! Compose your own grand saga as you voyage through the 9 realms, from the treetops of Yggdrasil, down into the mines of Svartalfheim and the depths of Hel! The third episode in the mythology series, this pack has hand carved textures, a thunderous soundtrack and a horde of skins. Skål!

packs.name: Pirates Of The Caribbean
packs.description: Take what you can. Give nothing back! Join Jack and his crew in the Pirates of the Caribbean Mash-up, featuring many of your favorite rogues and rascals. Plot a course from Tortuga to Shipwreck Cove and all the way down to Davy Jones' Locker. This is the day you will always remember as the day you sailed with Captain Jack Sparrow.

packs.name: Redstone Specialists
packs.description: Check out this skin pack inspired by redstone - Minecraft's most technical resource. It features 15 redstone experts, creators and mad scientists. Dress the part and get creative!

packs.name: Solo: A Star Wars Story Pack
packs.description: Whether you're a driver, a flyer or a smuggler, you've been waiting for a shot like this. Buckle up and jump into hyperspace with the Solo: A Star Wars Story™ Skin Pack! Assemble a crew with characters like Han Solo, Lando Calrissian, L3-37 and more!

packs.name: Star Wars Classic
packs.description: A long time ago in a galaxy far, far away.... The Star Wars Classic Skin Pack features an assortment of over 50 heroes, villains, and rogues from the Galactic Civil War. Whether you pick a Jawa or the mighty Darth Vader, you can play as your favorite Star Wars characters from Episodes IV to VI, Minecraft style.

packs.name: Star Wars Prequel
packs.description: A long time ago in a galaxy far, far away.... The Star Wars Prequel Skin Pack is now available. Choose from over 50 skins and play as some of your favorite Star Wars characters, Minecraft style.

packs.name: Star Wars Rebels
packs.description: Are you ready to join the rebellion - Minecraft style? The Star Wars Rebels Skin Pack features the crew of the Ghost and their adversaries in the Galactic Empire. Choose from over 20 skins and play as your favorite Star Wars Rebels characters.

packs.name: Star Wars Sequel
packs.description: A long time ago in a galaxy far, far away... The epic adventure continues with the Star Wars Sequel Skin Pack. Explore both sides of the Force™, Minecraft-style, as powerful Star Wars characters like Rey and Kylo Ren from Star Wars™: The Force Awakens and Star Wars™: The Last Jedi.

packs.name: Steven Universe
packs.description: Steven enters the Minecraft universe in this Diamond-worthy Mash-up! Contains Steven Universe-themed skins, textures, original music from the show, and all your favourite locations, from Beach City to Homeworld. Believe in Steven!

packs.name: Story Mode
packs.description: Create your own adventure with this skin pack featuring your favorite characters from Minecraft: Story Mode. All the Jesse, Olivia, Axel, Petra skins and many more are included!

packs.name: Stranger Things
packs.description: Something is coming, something hungry for blood. A shadow grows on the wall behind you, swallowing you in darkness. It is almost here… Boom! Stranger Things comes to Minecraft! Join Mike, Dustin, Lucas, Will, Eleven, Joyce, Hopper and many more as they survive monsters, adolescence and 80's fashion choices.

packs.name: Super Cute Texture Pack
packs.description: The Super Cute Texture Pack lets you create a cheerful world full of the cutest and cuddliest mobs! Bouncing bunnies, ultra-adorable unicorns, brilliant bumblebees and, er, burgers? Yes, burgers! Even the squid will make you Squeee! This texture pack comes with 15 skins!

packs.name: The Incredibles
packs.description: Grab your super suit and join the action with the Parr family and other heroes and villains in this incredible skin pack!

packs.name: The Nightmare Before Christmas
packs.description:
A nightmare? Before Christmas?
With thousands of blocks over there
And more redstone than I can bear?
Looks scary, but also fun!
Could it be I got my wish?
Should I play, or should I run?
A Christmas pack so nightmarish!

packs.name: The Simpsons
packs.description: The Simpsons as you have never seen them before; in pure, unadulterated Minecraft block-o-vision! Don't miss out this awesome pack featuring 24 characters from the series.

packs.name: Toy Story
packs.description: Open up the toy box! Woody, Buzz, Bo Peep and many of your favorite toys come to life in this oversized Mash-up based on all the Toy Story movies! To infinity and beyond!

packs.name: Fallout
packs.description: Welcome to the wasteland! Crack open the Vault containing 44 unique skins, custom textures, re-skinned mobs, a special post-apocalyptic map, original soundtrack compilation and a Pip-Boy inspired UI.

packs.name: Villains
packs.description: Unleash your inner villain with a pack dripping in the devious, the dastardly and the downright despicable! Scoundrels and schemers, mischief-makers and malevolent masterminds - this pack has the lot. Can you tell fiend from foe?
